case_title: ROLAND Y. WONG VS. AMELCO ELECTRIC S.F.INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, ROLAND Y. AS TO DEFENDANT AMELCO ELECTRIC S.F.INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, ROLAND Y. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMELCO ELECTRIC S.F.INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $3,743.43 PRINCIPAL, $42.41 INTEREST, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,939.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
